creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Julien, 

Sorry for unfortunate very long waiting time

I'm a bit reluctant adding packages where upstream is seemingly dead, there are a few other emulation projects that are active which might be a better choice/substitute in that regard?

https://github.com/stardot/b-em
https://github.com/scarybeasts/beebjit
https://github.com/tom-seddon/b2

Best regards,
Daniel
